description: Port the behavior from src/app/api/dashboard/route.ts into a deployed Lambda route. The Vite/static patient app needs GET /api/dashboard to refresh the patient dashboard after load. Scope: verify Cognito session from the patient access cookie; load the dashboard view model via loadPatientDashboard and the DynamoDB app data repository; return 401 authentication_required for missing/invalid sessions; return 503 dashboard_unavailable for config/storage/provider failures; set Cache-Control: no-store/private; avoid PHI leakage in logs and responses. Wire the route in CDK as GET /api/dashboard and grant only required DynamoDB permissions. Acceptance criteria: live API route no longer returns 404; handler tests cover unauthenticated, repository unavailable, and successful dashboard cases; frontend dashboard refresh works against API Gateway.
title: Add Lambda/API Gateway route for GET /api/dashboard
